HGSS.662.0001:
Tweet! Tweeeeeet!\f
If my FARFETCH’D sees anything pretty,
it goes and gets it.\f
Do you like pretty things?
I could share if it gets some more.\f
How about we trade phone numbers?
I’ll call if it finds anything. [0200,0000]
HGSS.662.0002:
I’ll call you as soon as I get
something pretty.
HGSS.662.0003:
You sure? Well, tell me if you change
your mind.
HGSS.662.0004:
Tweet! Tweeeeeet!
Do you like pretty things?\f
I could share if FARFETCH’D goes
and gets more.\f
Will you give me your
phone number? [0200,0000]
HGSS.662.0005:
Tweet! Tweeeeeet!\f
Huh?\f
...Oh, I see.
I thought you came over here because\r
you were enticed by my whistling.\f
That wasn’t it. You just came for the
Star Piece, didn’t you? Here you go!\f
HGSS.662.0006:
Tweet! Tweeeeeet!\f
...Huh? Wait, don’t tell me that you’re
calling from nearby?\f
Well, why not come a little closer and
talk in person!
HGSS.662.0007:
Hey listen, my [0100,000A,0000]’s stalk
has this really delicious aroma.\f
That aroma gets my appetite going!\f
Be seeing you!
HGSS.662.0008:
A while ago, my FARFETCH’D knocked out
this [0100,000B,0000]. You should have\r
seen FARFETCH’D wield that stalk.\f
Amazing stuff!
Be seeing you!
HGSS.662.0009:
I ran into a wild [0100,000B,0000]...\f
I was trying to catch it, but it took
off faster than I thought it would.\r
It was a bit disappointing.\f
Be seeing you!
HGSS.662.0010:
Want to battle again?\f
For some reason, my FARFETCH’D is all
worked up and raring to go.\f
[0104,0003,0000] is where I’m at.
Keep an eye out for me, OK?
HGSS.662.0011:
[0103,0000,0000], could you hurry over?
FARFETCH’D is agitated.\f
If you don’t come soon, it might smack
me with its stalk!\f
[0104,0003,0000]!
Please come as soon as you can!
HGSS.662.0012:
[0103,0000,0000], could you hurry over?
FARFETCH’D is agitated.\f
If you don’t come soon, it might smack
me with its stalk!\f
[0104,0003,0000]!
Please come as soon as you can!
HGSS.662.0013:
I haven’t gotten what I promised
you yet.\f
I’ll call you as soon as I get it, so
could you wait a little longer?
HGSS.662.0014:
My FARFETCH’D had something pretty in
its beak.\f
Like I promised, you can have it.\f
Catch up to me on [0104,0003,0000],
and I’ll let you have it.
HGSS.662.0015:
What’s wrong?
Don’t you want this gift?\f
Catch up to me on [0104,0003,0000],
and I’ll let you have it.
